item.title: Lazy Magnolia Brewery, 2009 CBC – Ep. 62
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
At this years Craft Brewers Conference we had the opportunity to speak with many of the top craft brewers in the country. As Mississippi’s only craft brewery, the Lazy Magnolia Brewery is a great example of the expansion the movement is taking, and better yet, it’s a husband/wife team that’s leading the way for the […]

The post Lazy Magnolia Brewery, 2009 CBC – Ep. 62 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Interview with Adam Avery
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Adam Avery of the Avery Brewing Company talked to Beer America TV .

The post Interview with Adam Avery first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Q&A with Brooklyn Brewery’s Garrett Oliver
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Beer America TV sits down with Garrett Oliver of the Brooklyn Brewery to talk about beer, film, music and more!

The post Q&A with Brooklyn Brewery’s Garrett Oliver first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Q&A with Sam Calagione
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
We caught up with Sam Calagione, founder of Dogfish Head Craft Brewery in Milton Delaware, and gained insight into his many off-centered, his thoughts on the craft beer industry and much, much more.

The post Q&A with Sam Calagione first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
